phases.name: Project Skeleton and Config
phases.goal: Runnable Python package with env, sources.yaml, logging
acceptance_criteria: Settings load required env with validation
sources.yaml parses and returns enabled sources
phases.rollback: Revert to empty src if structure conflicts

phases.name: SQLite Dedup and Scan State
actions: Bootstrap mode: insert skipped without pipeline
Early-exit known count logic in repository queries
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests: new vs known project detection
phases.rollback: Delete db file and recreate schema migration

phases.name: BrowserClient Abstraction
phases.goal: Protocol + Cursor and External MCP adapters (stub external if no server)
acceptance_criteria: Adapter interface covered by fake/mock tests
phases.rollback: Single adapter only if dual impl blocks progress

phases.name: Kwork Adapter Scan and Read
actions: Navigate listing URL, extract cards via evaluate JS
acceptance_criteria: Returns ProjectPreview list from live or fixture HTML
Integration test with saved HTML fixture
phases.rollback: Use fixture-only mode for CI without browser

phases.name: Analyzer LightRAG + GPT Score
phases.goal: Dual LightRAG queries and GPT scoring JSON
actions: GptScorer with system prompt from promptFrilance.md
phases.rollback: Deterministic local scorer for dev flag

phases.name: Telegram Approval Bot
phases.goal: Review cards, approve/reject, pending offers store
actions: Daily limit check before submit handoff
phases.rollback: CLI approve for dev if bot blocked

phases.name: Submit Offer and Excel Journal
acceptance_criteria: Excel row appended on successful submit
Submit blocked when REQUIRE_TELEGRAM_APPROVAL and no approve
Response text stored in pending offer

phases.name: Scheduler Daemon and Pipeline
phases.goal: Long-running loop orchestrating full state machine
actions: Asyncio daemon: scan interval per source
acceptance_criteria: Daemon runs scan cycle on interval
Scan log line format matches spec

phases.name: E2E Hardening and Review
actions: Security review secrets and approval gate
acceptance_criteria: All mandatory MVP acceptance from promptFrilance.md phase 1
phases.rollback: Disable submit in prod until manual sign-off
